title: Malaysian Chicken Bake
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish combining the spices of Malaysia with the simplicity of a chicken bake.
instructions: Season the chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and Malaysian oregano.
In a blender or food processor, blend the fermented soybean paste, coconut milk, and chopped spring onions until smooth.
Place the chicken breasts in a baking dish and brush the blended mixture evenly over both breasts.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
